name: Evil Eye Reemergence
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>眷</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>けん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>現</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>呪</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>眼</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>がん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Special Summon 1 "Familiar of the Evil Eye Token" (Fiend/DARK/Level 1/ATK 400/DEF 400), or, if "Evil Eye of Selene" is in your Spell & Trap Zone, you can Special Summon 2 instead, also for the rest of this turn after this card resolves, you cannot Special Summon monsters, except Fiend monsters. You can banish this card from your GY; your opponent cannot target "Evil Eye" Spells/Traps you control with card effects this turn. You can only use each effect of "Evil Eye Reemergence" once per turn.
eff: Special Summon 1 "Familiar of the Evil Eye Token" (Fiend/DARK/Level 1/ATK 400/DEF 400), or, if "Evil Eye of Selene" is in your Spell & Trap Zone, you can Special Summon 2 instead, also for the rest of this turn after this card resolves, you cannot Special Summon monsters, except Fiend monsters. You can banish this card from your GY; your opponent cannot target "Evil Eye" Spells/Traps you control with card effects this turn. You can only use each effect of "Evil Eye Reemergence" once per turn.

mentions: Familiar of the Evil Eye Token
mst: Prevents other cards being targeted by card effects
summoning: Restricts the player's Special Summons to Type specific monsters
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
